reference: I started feeling numbness in my right thumb during my strength training workout yesterday. It hasn’t gone away. What causes this, and should I be concerned? Furthermore, how long might this last? I have been working out with a trainer for the last five weeks and have never experienced this before. However, we did a new exercise yesterday when I did experience this.
text: She said, "You know from the moment they picked you up at the fort," and I was like, "What? How did you know?" I thought, "Oh my goodness, what if my life changed?"
